meta.title: Combo Draw Outs
meta.description: Count outs when you have multiple draws at once — be careful about overlapping outs!

blocks.content:
## Combo Draw Outs

Sometimes you have more than one draw at once — a flush draw plus overcards, or a straight draw plus a flush draw. When counting combo draw outs, be careful not to double-count cards that complete multiple draws. Let's practice getting those totals right!

blocks.title: Combo Draw Outs Drill
blocks.instructions: Count the total number of outs across all your draws. Be careful about overlapping outs — a card that completes both a flush and a straight should only be counted once.
